category_sources: Official templ guide describes building HTML with Go and compiling components into Go code.
source_facts.description says templ is a language for writing HTML user interfaces in Go.
display_name_sources: Official documentation is titled templ and uses lowercase templ as the project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official templ guide at templ.guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/a-h/templ, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official templ guide describes HTML components, server-side rendering, static rendering, and compiled Go code.
source_facts.description identifies Go HTML UI language.
